Describe the visible actions and scene transitions occurring throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand reaches towards a yellow scoop of ice cream on a pink tablecloth; at 4s, the arm reaches towards colorful cupcakes placed behind the cones; at 12s, the camera pans across a wooden table set with white bowls containing liquids; at 14s, a hand hovers directly above a pink and white striped party hat resting on a box.
